name: alan-tui
description: Terminal UI for alan Agent Runtime

scripts.build:binary: bun run build:js && bun run build:standalone
scripts.lint: bun run typecheck && bun test src && oxfmt --check src package.json tsconfig.json rolldown.config.mjs scripts/build-standalone.mjs scripts/smoke-standalone-websocket.mjs
scripts.format: oxfmt src package.json tsconfig.json rolldown.config.mjs scripts/build-standalone.mjs scripts/smoke-standalone-websocket.mjs
